text: Every morning, I wake up at six o'clock. First, I do a short meditation, then I stretch for a few minutes. After a light breakfast and a shower, I pack my bag and leave for work by eight-thirty. My workday usually runs from nine to five, with a thirty-minute lunch break. I make a point to eat something healthy and take a short walk outside. When I finish work, I exercise for about forty-five minutes at a nearby gym, either running on a treadmill or doing some strength training. In the evening, I prepare a simple dinner, read or watch a documentary, and then review my plan for the next day. I head to bed around ten o'clock to ensure I can wake up feeling refreshed. This consistency helps me stay productive and balanced.
